title: centrosema pascuorum
intro: Centrosema pascuorum, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centrosema pascuorum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. Centrosema pascuorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
